subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the Sovereign of Might unto him who hath turned towards God, the Lord of all worlds, that he may rejoice in that which hath been sent down from heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الجبروت لمن اقبل الی الله رب العالمین لیفرح بما نزل من سماء
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world
